16	        XCTAssertTrue(ctrl.isBlowingBig)

18	    }

21	        let ctrl = BubbleController()

23	        // simulate growth
24	        ctrl.bigBubbleProgress = 0.7
25	        let result = ctrl.stopBigBubble()

1	import SwiftUI
2	import SpriteKit
3	
4	struct ContentView: View {
5	    @EnvironmentObject var controller: BubbleController
6	
7	    /// Keep a single BubbleScene alive (not recreated each access like a computed property).
8	    @State private var scene: BubbleScene = {
9	        let s = BubbleScene()
10	        s.scaleMode = .resizeFill
11	        return s
12	    }()
13	
14	    /// SoundManager is @MainActor; using @State preserves the reference across view updates.
15	    @State private var soundManager = SoundManager()
16	
17	    /// Container size from GeometryReader, replaces deprecated UIScreen.main.bounds.
18	    @State private var viewSize: CGSize = .zero
19	
20	    var body: some View {
21	        GeometryReader { geometry in
22	            ZStack {
23	                // SpriteKit scene - full screen background
24	                SpriteView(scene: scene, options: [.allowsTransparency])
25	                    .ignoresSafeArea()
26	
27	                // Style toggle button - top right
28	                VStack {
29	                    HStack {
30	                        Spacer()
31	                        Button(action: {
32	                            controller.toggleStyle()
33	                        }) {
34	                            Image(systemName: controller.currentStyle == .realistic
35	                                ? "eye" : "circle.fill")
36	                                .font(.title)
37	                                .padding(12)
38	                                .background(.ultraThinMaterial)
39	                                .clipShape(Circle())
40	                        }
41	                        .padding(.trailing, 20)
42	                        .padding(.top, 60)
43	                    }
44	                    Spacer()
45	                    // Crazy mode button - right edge, middle
46	                    HStack {
47	                        Spacer()
48	                        crazyModeButton
49	                            .padding(.trailing, 8)
50	                    }
51	                    Spacer()
52	                }
53	
54	                // Bubble machine control buttons - bottom
55	                VStack {
56	                    Spacer()
57	                    HStack(spacing: 60) {
58	                        bigBubbleButton
59	                        smallBubbleButton
60	                    }
61	                    .padding(.bottom, 50)
62	                }
63	            }
64	            .onAppear {
65	                viewSize = geometry.size
66	                soundManager.preloadAll()
67	                scene.controller = controller
68	                scene.soundManager = soundManager
69	            }
70	        }
71	    }
72	
73	    // MARK: - Big Bubble Button (long press to grow, release to launch)
74	
75	    private var bigBubbleButton: some View {
76	        let longPress = LongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 0.05)
77	            .onChanged { _ in
78	                guard !controller.isBlowingBig else { return }
79	                controller.startBigBubble()
80	
81	                // Spawn a tiny bubble that grows while held.
82	                let centerX = viewSize.width / 2 - 80
83	                scene.spawnBigBubble(
84	                    at: CGPoint(x: centerX, y: 200),
85	                    params: BubbleStyle.seedParams(style: controller.currentStyle),
86	                    style: controller.currentStyle
87	                )
88	                soundManager.play(.blow, volume: 0.3)
89	            }
90	            .onEnded { _ in
91	                let progress = controller.stopBigBubble()
92	                scene.releaseBigBubble(progress: progress)
93	            }
94	
95	        return Circle()
96	            .fill(
97	                LinearGradient(
98	                    colors: [.blue.opacity(0.7), .cyan.opacity(0.5)],
99	                    startPoint: .topLeading, endPoint: .bottomTrailing
100	                )
101	            )
102	            .frame(width: 90, height: 90)
103	            .overlay(
104	                Image(systemName: "bubbles.and.sparkles")
105	                    .font(.title)
106	                    .foregroundColor(.white)
107	            )
108	            .shadow(radius: 5)
109	            .gesture(longPress)
110	    }
111	
112	    // MARK: - Small Bubble Button (hold to rapid-fire small bubbles)
113	
114	    private var smallBubbleButton: some View {
115	        let longPress = LongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 0.05)
116	            .onChanged { _ in
117	                guard !controller.isBlowingSmall else { return }
118	                controller.startSmallBubbles()
119	                // Instant feedback: spawn one visible bubble immediately
120	                let pos = CGPoint(x: viewSize.width / 2 + 80, y: 200)
121	                scene.spawnSmallBubble(at: pos, style: controller.currentStyle)
122	                soundManager.play(.smallPop, volume: 0.6)
123	            }
124	            .onEnded { _ in
125	                controller.stopSmallBubbles()
126	            }
127	
128	        return Circle()
129	            .fill(
130	                LinearGradient(
131	                    colors: [.pink.opacity(0.7), .purple.opacity(0.5)],
132	                    startPoint: .topLeading, endPoint: .bottomTrailing
133	                )
134	            )
135	            .frame(width: 80, height: 80)
136	            .overlay(
137	                VStack(spacing: 0) {
138	                    Image(systemName: "circle.fill").font(.caption2)
139	                    Image(systemName: "circle.fill").font(.caption2)
140	                    Image(systemName: "circle.fill").font(.caption2)
141	                }
142	                .foregroundColor(.white.opacity(0.8))
143	            )
144	            .shadow(radius: 5)
145	            .gesture(longPress)
146	    }
147	
148	    // MARK: - Crazy Mode Button (tap to unleash massive bubbles from right edge)
149	
150	    private var crazyModeButton: some View {
151	        Button(action: {
152	            controller.toggleCrazyMode()
153	        }) {
154	            ZStack {
155	                Circle()
156	                    .fill(controller.isCrazyMode
157	                        ? AnyShapeStyle(
158	                            LinearGradient(
159	                                colors: [.red, .orange, .yellow, .green, .blue, .purple],
160	                                startPoint: .topLeading, endPoint: .bottomTrailing
161	                            )
162	                        )
163	                        : AnyShapeStyle(.ultraThinMaterial)
164	                    )
165	                    .frame(width: 60, height: 60)
166	                Image(systemName: controller.isCrazyMode
167	                    ? "sparkles"
168	                    : "sparkle")
169	                    .font(.title2)
170	                    .foregroundColor(controller.isCrazyMode ? .white : .primary)
171	                    .symbolEffect(.pulse, isActive: controller.isCrazyMode)
172	            }
173	        }
174	        .shadow(radius: controller.isCrazyMode ? 10 : 3)
175	    }
176	}
177
`LongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 0.05)` 在 SwiftUI 中可靠性很差——极短的 minimumDuration 经常导致手势永远不触发 `.onChanged`。标准做法是用 `DragGesture(minimumDistance: 0)` 实现"按下即响应"。

构建 + 14/14 测试通过。

---

**总结这次修复**：

| 根因 | 修复 |
|------|------|
| `LongPressGesture(minimumDuration: 0.05)` 在 iOS 上不可靠，经常不触发 | 换成 `DragGesture(minimumDistance: 0)` — 按下瞬间即触发 `.onChanged`，抬起触发 `.onEnded` |
| SpriteView（UIKit 底层）在 ZStack 中拦截了所有触摸，导致 SwiftUI 手势收不到事件 | SpriteView 加 `.allowsHitTesting(false)` |
| 禁用 SpriteView 触摸后，戳泡泡功能丢失 | 在 SpriteView 和按钮之间插入 `Color.clear` 透明层，用 `DragGesture.onEnded` 转发点击坐标给 `scene.handleTap()` |

改动涉及 3 个文件：`ContentView.swift`、`BubbleScene.swift`（`handleTap` 改为 internal）、`BubbleController.swift`（已有 crazy mode）。在 Xcode 里 `Cmd+R` 跑起来测试一下。

构建、测试、xcodebuild、模拟器运行都通过了，**但手势交互我没法在命令行验证**——`simctl` 不支持模拟长按/拖拽手势，只能判断不崩溃。

你需要在 Xcode 里 `Cmd+R` 实际触摸验证：按住蓝色按钮看泡泡是否从底部冒出并持续变大、按住粉色按钮看小泡泡是否连续发射、点击右侧彩虹按钮看泡泡是否从右边缘涌入。
